titleStmt.title: SII 16.251: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 251. (A.R. No. 15 of 1904.) HAṀPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the deserted shrine to the west of the Viṭṭhalasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1483, Raudri (current), Phālguṇa, the other details being lost.

It registers an agreement (kaulu) granted by Kuruchēṭi Śrīraṅgarāju, son of Obuḷrāju of the solar race and Kāśyapa-gōtra to a person (name lost) for his having levelled and brought under cultivation a specified piece of land stipulating an annual payment of one ghaṭṭi varāha by him into the treasury of god Viṭṭhalēśvara and a fourth share of the produce to the donor. The details pertaining to the rest of the produce are lost. Refers to a gift of garden land made to (the shrine of) Tirumaṅgai-Āḻvār on the occasion of Prathama-ēkādaśi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu [.] svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava[¨rṣa]ṁbulu 1483 Agunēṭi raudri saṁvatsara phālguṇa śu lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadāśivadēvamahā
rāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdulanu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthivīsāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍaṁ gānu kāśyapagōtra sūryavaṁśōdbhavulaina kurucēṭi Ōbuḷarājuṁgāri komāruṁḍu śrīraṁgarājuluṁgāru
tirumaṁgayāḷuvā¨rlaku prathamaikādaśipuṇyakālamaṁdulanu sama¨rppiṁcina tōṁṭa śrīviṭhala dēvaraku Amṛtapaḷlaku cellivaccē gōrikiṁddanu tēruvīthiki tū¨rpubāgānanunna
tēruvīthi Aṁkaṇāla biḍuvuku Uttaramu dhanurākāramaivunna pedabōḍuku dakṣiṇamunnu yī catussīmakunnu lōnaina staḷaṁ ghaṭu nariki dārigā vūḍipiṁcci cēyiṁ
ccina kavulu maryādanu yēṁḍu 1 ki ghaṭi ga 1 varaha nivādhananu Read nivēdananu .śrīviṭhalēśva¨rla śrībhaṁḍārānaku sama¨rpiṁcci māku 4 pāliki vaccina Ādāyamu The inscription stops here abruptly. cf., South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. IV, No. 279.
Digital edition of SII 16.251 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
